name: Spaghetti with Curly Endive & Balsamic Vinega
recipeIngredient: 1 head Endive, trimmed and cut into bite-sized pieces
1 tbsp Balsamic vinegar, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti until it is al dente.
2. Meanwhile, sauté 3 garlic cloves in about 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
3. Quickly add the endive to this mixture and cook for a moment.
4. Add balsamic vinegar, cook briefly, then remove from heat.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Drain the pasta, toss with the remaining garlic and oil.
7. Serve each portion topped with a generous spoonful of the sautéed endive, adding extra vinegar if desired.
VARIATIONS: Add 6 oz cooked cannellini beans when you sauté the endive and season with a sprinkle of red pepper flakes if desired. Instead of endive, use 2 heads of radicchio or green and red Treviso lettuce. Follow the basic recipe above.
